query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: A black-and-white photograph of a dark quadruped animal standing in an open field, with a horizontal dark band of distant land or trees dividing a bright sky above from a bright ground surface below.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily motion-blurred black-and-white photograph in which a dark quadruped animal dissolves into an unrecognizable silhouette within a stark, blown-out landscape, with a horizontal dark band severing an overexposed sky from an equally bright ground plane; the extreme blur, crushed tonal range, and snapshot framing reduce the scene to abstract gesture and oppressive emptiness.
